---
title: "Mary Geraldine Guinness"
---

## Mary Geraldine Guinness

**Dates:** (1888/9-after 1952)

### Description

  daughter of the Rev. Robert Guinness and Grace Harriet Butler

### Biography

She married James Alfred Fort and had issue.  [LG 1952 Guinness of Wootton Hall, <i>Guinness Family</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
